name: Feature request

title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""

## Goal

What user, admin, or business problem does this solve?

## Proposed Scope

- 

## User Experience Notes

Describe expected screens, states, mobile behavior, and edge cases.

## Technical Notes

Mention affected routes, services, providers, environment variables, or database models.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Premium, calm travel UX
- [ ] Mobile and desktop responsive
- [ ] Loading, error, and empty states covered
- [ ] No secrets exposed
- [ ] Tests/checks documented in PR
